Create a new project from the root, and init a git repo. I want to setup a EC2 spot instance on AWS using pulumi that runs a ARM processor with 64G ram and 16 CPUS (at least). I want to setup a image for for Linux (Amazon?) that setups up a development environment for traillens. It must have the Python 3.14.x, the latest Node JS, and setup opencode for server and web. It must allow me to pass in an set of agent files to run a task and shutdown. See what you can come up with.

Call the project agentcore.
